皮: skin (of an animal or a plant)
往: go (with the intention to come back)
楼: building with at least two floors
戻: turn back to how it was
璧: gem with a hole in the center
跡: traces (of something moving or being done)
倦: be tired of and have enough
厭: be bored of and have enough
叶: become true (a wish or a prayer)
磐: large rock in which the gods dwell
